text: I'll start by exploring the codebase to understand the existing types and JSONL format.

tool_uses.name: Agent
tool_uses.input:
{"subagent_type": "Explore", "description": "Explore session types and JSONL format", "prompt": "I need to understand the Rust codebase structure for building a session diff tool. Please explore thoroughly:

1. Find all Session, ConversationMessage, ContentBlock type definitions in rust/crates/runtime/src/ or anywhere in rust/
2. Find any JSONL parsing/serialization code for sessions
3. Find compaction-related types and metadata
4. Find token usage types
5. Look at how sessions are saved/loaded as JSONL files
6. Look at existing examples in rust/crates/runtime/examples/ for patterns to follow
7. Check the Cargo.toml files in rust/ and rust/crates/runtime/ to understand dependencies available

Report file paths and line numbers for all key types and functions."}
